## Issue Type

**What kind of documentation issue is this?**
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Incorrect/outdated information
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Typo or grammatical error
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Missing code example
- [ ] Missing diagram or visual aid
- [ ] Formatting issue
- [ ] Other (specify):

## Checklist

Before submitting, please ensure:
- [ ] I've checked if this documentation already exists elsewhere
- [ ] I've identified the specific file(s) that need updates
- [ ] I've provided clear suggestions for improvement
- [ ] I've considered the target audience
- [ ] I've read the [Contributing Guidelines](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Willingness to Contribute

**Are you willing to write this documentation?**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR with the documentation
- [ ] Yes, with guidance on structure/style
- [ ] No, but I can review proposed changes
- [ ] No, just reporting the issue
